mnemonics: ISBN 0195128958 stands for 'I Study Best Nash' - a reminder that this module covers Nash Equilibria and other foundational game theory concepts.
keyPoints: Nash Equilibrium: A stable state where no player can benefit by unilaterally changing strategy.
Mechanism Design: Creating rules to achieve desired outcomes in strategic settings.
Price of Anarchy: Measures how efficiency degrades due to selfish behavior versus optimal coordination.
commonMistakes: Assuming Nash Equilibria always exist in all game types (they don't in games without certain properties).
Confusing dominated strategies with Nash Equilibrium (NE requires no incentive to deviate, not just avoiding bad choices).
